title: @lsp-indexer
description: LUKSO blockchain indexer with React and Next.js hooks for querying LSP-standard entities (Universal Profiles, Digital Assets, NFTs, and more) via Hasura GraphQL.

pages.title: Quickstart
pages.description: Get up and running with @lsp-indexer in under 5 minutes.

pages.title: Indexer
pages.description: Architecture and configuration of the @lsp-indexer blockchain processor.

pages.title: @lsp-indexer/node
pages.description: Low-level GraphQL fetch functions, parsers, query key factories, and subscription client.

pages.title: @lsp-indexer/react
pages.description: Client-side React hooks for querying LUKSO blockchain data.

pages.title: @lsp-indexer/next
pages.description: Next.js server actions and query hooks for server-side data fetching.
